query: sickly yellow green tint photograph unhealthy skin tone
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / sickly_cast — yellow/green sickly tints, jaundice and unhealthy color casts

response.objective_caption: A young person with shoulder-length, tousled blonde hair poses against a solid black background. They are wearing a fuzzy light blue bathrobe with a subtle snowflake pattern over a dark teal shirt. A white cold compress bag covered in blue stars rests on top of their head. A white digital thermometer with a green button extends from their mouth, and their brown eyes are looking upward.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A young person with shoulder-length, tousled blonde hair poses against a solid black background, displaying a distressed and miserable expression. They are wearing a fuzzy light blue bathrobe with a subtle snowflake pattern over a dark teal shirt. A white cold compress bag covered in blue stars rests on top of their head. A white digital thermometer with a green button extends from their mouth. Their watery brown eyes look upward with visible discomfort, and their facial expression conveys sadness and illness.
